The question is asking to determine how many games Aberdeen had without any scorers this season. Since each row represents a match and the "aberdeen scorer(s)" column indicates the players who scored (empty meaning no scorers), we need to group by the "aberdeen scorer(s)" column to count the matches with no scorers. We can use the f_group_column(aberdeen scorer(s)) operation to group the matches based on whether they had scorers or not.

There are a total of 14 games where there were no Aberdeen scorers.
